name: quick view button on custom student list

function(value) { // value = value || 0; // return ` //  // `; // } // }, // refresh: function(listview) { // if (!listview.quick\_view\_button\_added) { // listview.page.add\_inner\_button(\_\_("Quick View Selected"), function() { // let selected = listview.get\_checked\_items(); // if (selected.length !== 1) { // frappe.msgprint("Select exactly one student to Quick View"); // return; // } // let doc\_name = selected[0].name; // frappe.db.get\_doc("Custom Student", doc\_name).then(function(doc) { // let d = new frappe.ui.Dialog({ // title: doc.student\_name || doc.name, // fields: [ // { label: "Enrollment Status", fieldname: "enrollment\_status", fieldtype: "Data", default: doc.enrollment\_status, read\_only: 1 }, // { label: "Program", fieldname: "current\_program", fieldtype: "Data", default: doc.current\_program, read\_only: 1 }, // { fieldtype: "Column Break" }, // { label: "Academic Year", fieldname: "current\_academic\_year", fieldtype: "Data", default: doc.current\_academic\_year, read\_only: 1 }, // { label: "Roll No", fieldname: "roll\_no", fieldtype: "Data", default: doc.roll\_no, read\_only: 1 }, // { fieldtype: "Section Break" }, // { label: "Register No", fieldname: "register\_no", fieldtype: "Data", default: doc.register\_no, read\_only: 1 }, // { label: "Admission Date", fieldname: "admission\_date", fieldtype: "Data", default: doc.admission\_date, read\_only: 1 }, // { fieldtype: "Column Break" }, // { label: "Date of Birth", fieldname: "date\_of\_birth", fieldtype: "Data", default: doc.date\_of\_birth, read\_only: 1 }, // { label: "Blood Group", fieldname: "blood\_group", fieldtype: "Data", default: doc.blood\_group, read\_only: 1 }, // { fieldtype: "Section Break" }, // { label: "Religion", fieldname: "religion", fieldtype: "Data", default: doc.religion, read\_only: 1 }, // { label: "Email", fieldname: "student\_email\_id", fieldtype: "Data", default: doc.student\_email\_id, read\_only: 1 }, // { fieldtype: "Column Break" }, // { label: "Mobile", fieldname: "student\_mobile\_number", fieldtype: "Data", default: doc.student\_mobile\_number, "address\_line\_1", fieldtype: "Data", default: doc.address\_line\_1, read\_only: 1 } // ], // primary\_action\_label: "Open Full Form", // primary\_action: function() { // d.hide(); // frappe.set\_route("Form", "Custom Student", doc\_name); // } // }); // d.show(); // }); // }); // listview.quick\_view\_button\_added = true; // } // } // }; frappe.listview\_settings['Custom Student'] = { add\_fields: ["register\_no", "roll\_no", "blood\_group", "admission\_date", "date\_of\_birth", "religion", "student\_email\_id", "student\_mobile\_number", "state", "address\_line\_1", "image", "student\_name", "current\_program", "current\_academic\_year", "enrollment\_status"], formatters: { fees\_progress: function(value) { value = value || 0; return `  `; } }, refresh: function(listview) { if (!listview.quick\_view\_button\_added) { listview.page.add\_inner\_button(\_\_("Quick View Selected"), function() { let selected = listview.get\_checked\_items(); if (selected.length !== 1) { frappe.msgprint("Select exactly one student to Quick View"); return; } let doc\_name = selected[0].name; frappe.db.get\_doc("Custom Student", doc\_name).then(function(doc) { let photo\_html = doc.image ? `![](${doc.image})` : `No photo uploaded`; let d = new frappe.ui.Dialog({ title: doc.student\_name || doc.name, fields: [ { fieldname: "photo\_html", fieldtype: "HTML", options: photo\_html }, { label: "Enrollment Status", fieldname: "enrollment\_status", fieldtype: "Data", default: doc.enrollment\_status, read\_only: 1 }, { label: "Program", fieldname: "current\_program", fieldtype: "Data", default: doc.current\_program, read\_only: 1 }, { fieldtype: "Column Break" }, { label: "Academic Year", fieldname: "current\_academic\_year", fieldtype: "Data", default: doc.current\_academic\_year, read\_only: 1 }, { label: "Roll No", fieldname: "roll\_no", fieldtype: "Data", default: doc.roll\_no, read\_only: 1 }, { fieldtype: "Section Break" }, { label: "Register No", fieldname: "register\_no", fieldtype: "Data", default: doc.register\_no, read\_only: 1 }, { label: "Admission Date", fieldname: "admission\_date", fieldtype: "Data", default: doc.admission\_date, read\_only: 1 }, { fieldtype: "Column Break" }, { label: "Date of Birth", fieldname: "date\_of\_birth", fieldtype: "Data", default: doc.date\_of\_birth, read\_only: 1 }, { label: "Blood Group", fieldname: "blood\_group", fieldtype: "Data", default: doc.blood\_group, read\_only: 1 }, { fieldtype: "Section Break" }, { label: "Religion", fieldname: "religion", fieldtype: "Data", default: doc.religion, read\_only: 1 }, { label: "Email", fieldname: "student\_email\_id", fieldtype: "Data", default: doc.student\_email\_id, read\_only: 1 }, { fieldtype: "Column Break" }, { label: "Mobile", fieldname: "student\_mobile\_number", fieldtype: "Data", default: doc.student\_mobile\_number, read\_only: 1 }, { label: "State", fieldname: "state", fieldtype: "Data", default: doc.state, read\_only: 1 }, { fieldtype: "Section Break" }, { label: "Address", fieldname: "address\_line\_1", fieldtype: "Data", default: doc.address\_line\_1, read\_only: 1 } ], primary\_action\_label: "Open Full Form", primary\_action: function() { d.hide(); frappe.set\_route("Form", "Custom Student", doc\_name); } }); d.show(); }); }); listview.quick\_view\_button\_added = true; } } };
